excluded_confounds: reach prerequisite: confirmed solved by enable_food_sense (Exp 237) before running the evolvability gate — not conflated with evolvability
index-artifact in navigation build: caught by flat-world null control (Exp 236 L40)
pairwise gradient mis-read as directional selection: caught by invasion-from-rarity manipulation check (L41); positive-frequency-dependence cannot bootstrap from rarity
the Preflight aggregate over-claiming PASS: self-healed in Exp 237 (L41 fix — invasion-from-rarity is now a required co-criterion alongside pairwise gradient)
non-depleting intake field (Exp 238-241 runaways): identified as foundational bug (line_integral_intake read structural rho() not depletable _resource grid); not conflated with stabilization results

whole-field availability as non-degeneracy gate (Exp 243): identified as spatial-dilution proxy, not population competition; DEPRECATED; per-capita intake density-dependence is the correct arbiter (Exp 244)

benefit saturation as the exclusive mechanism in continuous space: the continuous substrate DOES remove discrete saturation — the non-saturating per-capita speed benefit is real (Exp 244-246); the binding barrier in continuous space is the stability-vs-competition trade-off, not benefit saturation

Mechanism A oscillation artifact: A-off runs confirmed oscillatory (deterministic seed-fixed), A-on is genuinely stabilizing; the stability-vs-competition trade-off is not an artifact of the stabilizer design
failed_mechanism: costed heritable locomotion (climb_ability / speed trait) as a locally evolvable trait on both the discrete comfort-gated gridworld and the toy ContinuousWorld substrate
implication: The local-gradient wall is now general across FIVE modalities on this substrate family: scalar senses (Exp 199-201), passive memory/inference (Exp 208-209), active information-gathering (Exp 210-213), locomotion on the discrete gridworld (Exp 235-237), AND the continuous-space substrate-engineering arc (Exp 238-246). In continuous space, the discrete-saturation obstacle IS gone — per-capita speed benefit is non-saturating — but it is traded for a deeper structural barrier: DEMOGRAPHIC STABILITY and STRONG RESOURCE COMPETITION are MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE on a toy consumer-resource substrate with a lagged energy-buffer agent (Mechanism A = density-dependent mortality stabilizes by capping N below resource-limitation, so STABLE iff WEAK competition; STRONG competition iff oscillatory). Useful-when-gifted ≠ locally evolvable; the stability-vs-competition trade-off is the continuous-space counterpart of the discrete-saturation mechanism. Both the discrete gridworld AND the toy ContinuousWorld substrate are CLOSED for locomotion evolvability. The substrate-engineering harness (ecology/evolvability/stability.py: AR(2) oscillation detector + non-degeneracy audit + cell certification + cert_run telemetry; gated mechanisms A/B/freeze/geometry/moving-patch) caught FOUR successive instrument artifacts a less-rigorous process would have published as escapes: the non-depleting field (Exp 242), discrete-founder calibration, whole-field availability spatial-dilution proxy, and the availability-not-the-right-KIND-of-measure error (Exp 243-244).
next_safe_region_to_test: re-opens only on a human word; both the discrete gridworld AND the toy continuous substrate are CLOSED for locomotion evolvability. The only named escape is OUT OF SCOPE for substrate engineering: a consumer with NO energy buffer (immediate resource-coupling, no lag between resource depletion and agent reproduction/mortality — eliminates the lagged feedback that drives oscillation), requiring an AGENT-ARCHITECTURE redesign. The continuous non-saturating speed benefit is real and preserved as a positive substrate result; the trade-off is the barrier.
observed_failure: The local-gradient wall holds for locomotion via two compounding layers. (a) EXPRESSIBILITY (Exp 235/236): the trait is behaviorally INERT — a local greedy forager (Exp 235, plateau intake ~1%) and a navigation-capable policy (Exp 236, gate-closed marginal ~0; retreat-on-failed-roll / persistence-starvation) cannot jointly satisfy REACH + GATED-BOTTLENECK + SURVIVE on this gridworld. (b) EVOLVABILITY (Exp 237): once food-gradient perception (enable_food_sense) solves reach+survive (intake 1%->62%), the gen-0 monomorphic benefit curve is FLAT (benefit saturation — every creature gets ~64% plateau food regardless of climb_ability), and invasion_from_rarity DOES_NOT_INVADE (7/8 seeds extinct). The Gate C pairwise "PASS" (7/8 invader-wins at 50/50) is POSITIVE FREQUENCY-DEPENDENCE / a priority effect: a resident advantage that cannot bootstrap from rarity, not directional selection. Caught by a predeclared L41 manipulation check; the Preflight aggregate was self-healed to require invasion-from-rarity alongside the pairwise gradient (L41 fix). (c) CONTINUOUS SPACE (Exp 238-242): ContinuousWorld.line_integral_intake read the structural rho() field (never depletes), not the depletable _resource grid — so Exp 238-241 ran with no density-dependent brake; the correct fix (enable_continuous_depletion_intake) eliminates runaway but yields oscillatory/limit-cycle dynamics; 0 stable fixed points in a 45-cell (regen x cost x speed) sweep; CAN'T POSE a clean ESS/invasion test; candidate escape RETIRED. (d) CONTINUOUS SUBSTRATE ENGINEERING (Exp 243-246): five substrate levers all failed to produce STRONG resource competition on the stabilized continuous substrate: (i) whole-field availability gate (Exp 243) — NO-GO but gate was wrong kind (spatial dilution, not population competition); (ii) per-capita intake density-dependence (Exp 244, CORRECTION) — genuine but WEAK competition exists (~7-9% per-capita-intake drop with N; 4/4 negative corr); substrate is WEAKLY-POSABLE, not cleanly degenerate; (iii) bump geometry concentration sharpened sigma 1.5->0.5 (Exp 245, NEGATIVE) — competition stays ~5-9% despite concentration; MECHANISM: grazed cells refill before sparse population revisits (refill-rate-vs-revisit-rate); (iv) moving/drifting food patch (Exp 246, NEGATIVE) — small-patch regime (~0.6 sigma) causes extinction (too few calories); larger patches show ~13% competition but OSCILLATE; STABLE patches give ~9% (weak). UNIFYING MECHANISM (Exp 246): STABILITY and STRONG COMPETITION are MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE: the stabilizer (global density-dependent mortality, Mechanism A) regulates headcount via mortality, capping N below resource-limitation; STABLE iff A-regulated iff below-resource-limited iff WEAK competition; STRONG competition iff resource-limited iff oscillatory iff UNSTABLE. The non-saturating per-capita speed benefit is REAL (continuous space removes the discrete saturation obstacle) but is traded for this trade-off, so locomotion still does not cleanly evolve here.
tested_conditions: Exp 235: sealed-plateau terrain + costed climb_ability, local greedy forager — NULL/INVALID (trait behaviorally inert; plateau intake ~1%)

Exp 236: navigation-capable policy (enable_navigation) + sealed terrain — gate-closed marginal ~0; retreat-on-failed-roll; persistence starves the pop; L40 metric-gaming via index-artifact caught and cleaned

Exp 237: food-gradient perception (enable_food_sense) solves reach+survive (plateau intake ~62%, flat-world null 33% food-driven); Gate C run; monomorphic benefit flat; invasion_from_rarity DOES_NOT_INVADE (7/8 extinct); pairwise 7/8 = frequency-dependence (L41); Preflight self-healed

Exp 238-242: ContinuousWorld substrate — foundational intake bug (rho() never depletes, not _resource); all prior runaways explained; correct fix (enable_continuous_depletion_intake) eliminates runaway but yields oscillatory/limit-cycle dynamics; 0 stable cells in 45-cell sweep; CAN'T POSE a clean ESS/invasion test; candidate escape RETIRED

Exp 243: stabilized continuous substrate certification — whole-field availability gate (>0.85) caught degenerate positives (0/24 non-degenerate cells); NO-GO verdict; but gate was wrong kind of non-degeneracy arbiter (spatial dilution ≠ population competition)

Exp 244: CORRECTION — per-capita intake density-dependence is the right arbiter; 4/4 negative corr(N, per-capita intake) at -0.395/-0.326/-0.483/-0.550; genuine but WEAK competition (~7-9% drop); substrate WEAKLY-POSABLE; whole-field availability gate DEPRECATED

Exp 245: bump geometry concentration (sigma 1.5->0.5, total food constant) — competition stays ~5-9% despite concentration; MECHANISM: refill-rate-vs-revisit-rate (grazed cells refill ~0.9 in ~4 steps before sparse pop revisits); four levers exhausted: founder-calibration, A-strength, regen-rate, bump-geometry

Exp 246: moving/drifting food patch (single concentrated Gaussian orbiting deterministically; sigma {0.6,0.8,1.2} x amplitude {4-12} x drift-period {150,300,600}) — small-patch regime causes extinction; larger-patch gives ~13% competition but OSCILLATES; stable patches give ~9% (weak); UNIFYING MECHANISM: demographic stability and strong resource competition are mutually exclusive at this substrate scale
